summary_en: 100,000 shares (0.66% of shares outstanding), ¥200M upper limit, open-market purchase on TSE, May 25 – June 30, 2026. Purpose: improve capital efficiency and return profit to shareholders.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Global Security Experts Inc. announced on May 22, 2026 that its board of directors resolved to acquire up to 100,000 treasury shares (0.66% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥200 million. The acquisition will be executed via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 25 and June 30, 2026. The company states the purpose is to improve capital efficiency and return profit to shareholders. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 257,612 treasury shares (including 129,252 shares held under a J-ESOP trust arrangement) against 15,051,988 issued shares outstanding.
